title: SSE streaming endpoint (GET /api/v1/streaming/*)
description: Implement Server-Sent Events streaming. Routes: /api/v1/streaming/user, /streaming/public, /streaming/public/local, /streaming/hashtag?tag=, /streaming/hashtag/local?tag=, /streaming/direct. Authenticates via Bearer token in Authorization header or access_token query param. Returns text/event-stream response that stays open and sends events.
design: axum SSE handler using axum::response::Sse. Subscribe to broadcast channel on connection. Forward StreamEvent to client as SSE data field with event: type. Heartbeat: empty comment line every 15s to keep connection alive. Auth: extract Bearer token from Authorization header or ?access_token= query param. On subscribe: create broadcast::Receiver from existing Sender.
acceptance_criteria: Phanpy receives live update events when followed accounts post; delete events fire on post deletion; notification events fire on mention; connection keeps alive with heartbeat; client can reconnect and not miss events (within broadcast buffer); multiple concurrent subscribers work
